r1_s1.description: Create full project directory structure: backend/config, backend/tests, frontend, tasks. Use MKDIR operations for each directory.

r1_s2.description: Create backend/.env with DATABASE_URL, NODE_ENV=development, PORT=3000, and JWT_SECRET placeholder. Use a template with DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD for PostgreSQL connection.

r1_s3.description: Create backend/config/db.js using pg Pool. Load dotenv, configure connection from process.env (DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD or DATABASE_URL), export a testConnection helper, and export pool. Handle missing env gracefully with a descriptive error.

r1_s4.description: Create root package.json with name, version 1.0.0, workspaces: ["backend", "frontend"], and backend/package.json with pg, dotenv, express dependencies and test script.

r1_s5.description: Create backend/schema.sql with CREATE EXTENSION for pgcrypto. Tables: users (id uuid PK DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), username UNIQUE NOT NULL, email UNIQUE NOT NULL, password_hash NOT NULL, created_at DEFAULT now(), updated_at DEFAULT now()), profiles (id uuid PK, user_id uuid FK, first_name, last_name, avatar_url, bio, created_at DEFAULT now(), updated_at DEFAULT now()), data_entries (id uuid PK, user_id uuid FK, entry_type NOT NULL, content JSONB, status DEFAULT 'open', metadata JSONB, created_at DEFAULT now(), updated_at DEFAULT now()). All string/date defaults use single-quoted literals. Add indexes and comments.

r1_s6.description: Create frontend/index.html as a minimal single-page app: HTML5 boilerplate, viewport meta, title 'Agent Bridge App', main div#app, inline script with a greeting message and timestamp.

r1_s7.description: Create backend/tests/db.test.js using Node.js test runner. Test that db.js: (1) loads without throwing when DATABASE_URL or all DB_* env vars are set, (2) pool object exists, (3) testConnection() is a function. Skip actual DB connection if env vars missing (detect and skip gracefully). Use mock env vars in test for CI simulation.

r1_s8.description: Verify the complete project structure: confirm backend/, frontend/, backend/config/db.js, backend/schema.sql, backend/tests/db.test.js, frontend/index.html, backend/.env, and both package.json files all exist. Run node --check on db.js for syntax validation and node --check on db.test.js.
